overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural farming village with thatched-roof huts, golden wheat fields, and festival decorations. The character passes geese and NPC villagers while following a dirt path toward a distant windmill on a partly cloudy summer day.

events.description: white geese cross the dirt path from right to left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path passing under wooden festival arches decorated with red and white pennants

notable_agents.action: white geese crossing the path and moving into the grass on the left side

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with straw roof and stone foundation
wooden frame structure with hanging red and white triangular pennants
low stone wall running alongside the path
golden wheat crops growing in fenced farmland
rustic wooden post fence bordering the wheat field

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path near a traditional thatched-roof hut, passing under decorative festival arches. White geese cross the path from right to left as the character moves through the rural village outskirts with golden wheat fields visible behind wooden fences.

events.description: two NPC villagers walk past Geralt from left to right crossing the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as villagers pass by in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: villager in brown clothing walking past the camera toward the right
second villager following behind the first on the path

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with dark sails visible in the distance
wooden pole with burning torch mounted on top

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wider farmland where two villagers pass by walking in the opposite direction. A windmill becomes visible in the distance on the left, and the stone wall shifts to the right side of the path as torch posts appear along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge path with stone walls

events.description: path crosses a small stream or wet marshy area with puddles

agents.ego_description: walking through more enclosed area with denser vegetation and trees ahead

entered.detail: dense cluster of tall green trees marking the forest edge
small water stream or wet marshy section crossing the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more enclosed area with dense forest trees ahead and stone walls lining the right side. The character crosses a small stream or wet section of the trail as the wheat fields continue on the left and the environment transitions toward woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a festive rural village that gradually transitions into a secluded woodland path. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail past thatched-roof huts and decorative festival arches, while white geese cross the path against a backdrop of golden wheat fields. As the path opens into wider farmland, the camera passes two villagers and reveals a distant windmill on the left while torch posts begin to line the trail. The scene then shifts toward a more enclosed environment, moving past stone walls and crossing a small stream. Finally, the open fields give way to dense forest trees as the character advances toward the woodland.
